title: VitalRecordRequest
description: An order for a certified copy of a NYC birth or death certificate from the DOHMH Office of Vital Records — the net-new WRITE object for this domain. Today this transaction lives inside the eVital VRRTS application (a816-evital.nyc.gov/eVitalVRRTS) and the third-party VitalChek portal, with no open, agent-native API. This schema models the request and its status so an agent could place and track an order.

requestId.description: Server-assigned request/order id (read-only; present on responses).

recordType.description: Which vital record is being ordered.

subject.description: The person named on the certificate.

eventDate.description: Date of birth or date of death.

requester.description: The person placing the order and their eligibility relationship to the subject.

relationship.description: Relationship to the record subject (drives eligibility).

purpose.description: Stated reason for the request (e.g. passport, benefits, estate).

deliveryMethod.description: How the certificate should be delivered.

status.description: Order status (read-only; set by the system).
